english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: لا اِلـهَ اِلاَّ اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَريكَ لَهُ لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ يُحْيى وَيُميتُ وَيُميتُ وَيُحْيى وَهُوَ حَىٌّ لا يَموُتُ بِيَدِهِ الْخَيْرُ وَهُوَ عَلى كُلِّ شَىْء قَديرٌ
english translation text:
There is no god save Allah, the Only One. He has no partner. Sovereignty belongs to Him. (All) Praise belongs to Him. He gives life, puts to death, makes dead, and brings to life. He is Ever-Alive, never non-existent, in His hand is the good. He is able to do all things.
Recite x10

arabic text: اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ الَّذى لا اِلـهَ اِلاّ هُوَ الْحَىُّ الْقَيُّومُ وَاَتوُبُ اِلَيْهِ
english translation text:
I ask forgiveness of Allah. There is no god save He, the Ever-Alive Eternal; and unto Him I turn repentant.
Recite x10

arabic text: يا بَديعُ السَّماواتِ وَالاَْرْضِ يا ذَا الْجَلالِ وَالاِكْرامِ
english translation text:
O Creator of the heavens and the earth.
O Owner of might and majesty.
Recite x10

O Ever-Alive! O Eternal!
Recite x10

O Giver! O Bestower!
Recite x10

O “There is no god save Thou”!
Recite x10

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
